title: SKY Sky+ HD 1 Terabyte Remote Control

crossSellProducts.title: ENERGIZER Max AA Alkaline Batteries - Pack of 8

offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

description.main: Upgrade your remote to the One For All Sky+ HD 1TB Remote Control and enjoy new feature enhancements that are compatible with all Sky+HD and Sky+HD Terabyte boxes. The same but better! You'll be able to perform all your standard TV and Sky TV commands on the one remote as usual but with added extra benefits to make your viewing even more pleasurable.
goodToKnow: The memory retention is permanent so you'll never need to re-programme your remote once you've set it up.
This stylish gunmetal remote is able to control the latest TVs and all SKY HD boxes.
